sections.passage:
Original passage for Review: Block 5 – Units 9 & 10

Mia joined a class project because the group wanted fresh practice for multiple choice practice. The tutor wrote (1) ...... (2) ...... (3) ...... (4) ...... (5) ...... on the board and asked everyone to explain their choices. Later, the group compared (6) ...... (7) ...... (8) ...... (9) ...... (10) ...... with the rule from the lesson. The text is new, but it practises the same multiple choice.
